'''Bridin Anchorage''', originally called '''Gallienis IV''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Portmoak sector/Legends|Portmoak sector]]. It was renamed after [[Quarlo Bridin]], a [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] who took over the world shortly after [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] death. It was once a lush world with beaches, but was covered in slums under Bridin's rule.

{{Planet-stub}}
